Z	d	d
d!d"d#
)$z3
A number of functions that enhance IDLE on macOS.
expanduserN)
platformc
    Initializes OS X Tk variant values for
    isAquaTk(), isCarbonTk(), isCocoaTk(), and isXQuartz().
    
darwin
windowingsystemZ
xquartzZ
aqua
otherZ
AppKitZ

cocoa
carbonN)
tkinterZ
call
_tk_typeZ
destroy)
rootZ
&/usr/lib64/python3.9/idlelib/macosx.py
_init_tk_type
    Returns True if IDLE is using a native OS X Tk (Cocoa or Carbon).
    r	
isAquaTk%
    Returns True if IDLE is using a Carbon Aqua Tk (instead of the
    newer Cocoa Aqua Tk).
    r
isCarbonTk-
    Returns True if IDLE is using a Cocoa Aqua Tk.
    r	
	isCocoaTk6
    Returns True if IDLE is using an OS X X11 Tk.
    r
	isXQuartz>
    Returns a string warning message if the Tk version in use appears to
    be one known to cause problems with IDLE.
    1. Apple Cocoa-based Tk 8.5.7 shipped with Mac OS X 10.6 is unusable.
    2. Apple Cocoa-based Tk 8.5.9 in OS X 10.7 and 10.8 is better but
        can still crash unexpectedly.
    
info
patchlevel)
8.5.7z
8.5.9Fz
WARNING: The version of Tcl/Tk ({0}) in use may be unstable.
Visit https://www.python.org/download/mac/tcltk/ for current information.N)
format)
tkVersionWarningG
    Fetch the macOS system preferences.
    r
Nz.~/Library/Preferences/.GlobalPreferences.plist

plist_filer
readSystemPreferences\
    Warn if "Prefer tabs when opening documents" is set to "Always".
    r
AppleWindowTabbingMode
alwaysz
WARNING: The system preference "Prefer tabs when opening documents" is set to "Always". This will cause various problems with IDLE. For the best experience, change this setting when running IDLE (via System Preferences -> Dock).)
get)
prefsr
preferTabsPreferenceWarningk
    This ensures that the application will respond to open AppleEvents, which
    makes is feasible to use IDLE as the default application for python files.
    c

)(zf
    Replace the Tk root menu by something that is more appropriate for
    IDLE with an Aqua Tk.

Z	closeItemZ
menubarZ
menudictr7
overrideRootMenu
Removed bad AquaTk Button-2 (right) and Paste bindings.
    They prevent context menu access and seem to be gone in AquaTk8.6.
    See issue #24801.
    
Textz
<B2>z
<B2-Motion>z
<<PasteSelection>>N)
unbind_classr+
fixb2context
    Perform initial OS X customizations if needed.
    Called from pyshell.main() after initial calls to Tk()
    There are currently three major versions of Tk in use on OS X:
        1. Aqua Cocoa Tk (native default since OS X 10.6)
        2. Aqua Carbon Tk (original native, 32-bit only, deprecated)
        3. X11 (supported by some third-party distributors, deprecated)
    There are various differences among the three that affect IDLE
    behavior, primarily with menus, mouse key events, and accelerators.
    Some one-time customizations are performed here.
    Others are dynamically tested throughout idlelib by calls to the
    isAquaTk(), isCarbonTk(), isCocoaTk(), isXQuartz() functions which
    are initialized here as well.
    N)
setupApp
__main__)
mainz
idlelib.idle_test.test_macosxr6
	verbosity)
__doc__Z
os.pathr
sysr
__name__Z
unittestrN
<module>
